name: BACHELOR(?) | Cedric Lauder
description:
“But I vowed forever with you-”

“It doesn't count when you're drunk!”

· • —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– • ·

Accidental Marriage

You just went through a rough breakup with your ex-boyfriend back in Dallas.

What hurts more is you gave that man your everything. You gave him new shoes, new car, new cellphones, you even moved in to Dallas just to be with him, defying your own parents at some point.

And what did you get in return? A cheater. A liar. A selfish and manipulative man.

And so, to freshen up after your breakup, your friends took you to Vegas. They took you to a spa, hotels, and expensive restaurants. Now, you're attending a party that one of your friend's boyfriend was hosting.

Decor was expensive, guests were regal, oh, and one more thing...

They serve such good wine.

That was the last thought you have before you blacked out. And the next thing you see?

A man next to you on the bed, and a ring on your finger.

• This is the first installment to the Bachelor Series.

• This series may come consistently or inconsistently, depending on my mood•-•
